calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:07am
Judge Pro Tem James P. Fleming, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, David W. Fermino, not present; respondent, Jean Paul Petraud, present. Judge Fleming allows Mr. Petraud, is sworn, and asks to submit a binder of evidence, but does not hear his case.
Mr. Fermino, did not appear to make good a bad check - for the appeal filing fee - for a total of $101.25. ($75.00 for the appeal and $26.25 penalty per GC6157.) The appeal, therefore, shall be dismissed by Judge James P. Fleming
